Ozowski, Esq., of ELLISON, NIELSEN, KNIBBS, ZEHE, & ANTAS, (415) 952-8020, appearing on behalf of plaintiff and responding party Fire Insurance Exchange. Joel H. Siegal, Esq., of SIEGAL & ASSOCIATES, (415) 777-5547, appearing for plaintiff and responding party Martin Eng.

Argued and the tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court:

Defendant Logitech's Motion for Summary Judgment of Plaintiff Eng's complaint in 320289 is DENIED. Triable issue of fact exists re agency relation and/or joint venture. Plaintiff to prepare order pursuant to 437 c(g).

Defendant Logitech's Motion for Summary Judgment of Plaintiff Fire Insurance Exchange's complaint in 323073 is DENIED. Triable issue of fact exists re agency relation and/or joint venture. Plaintiff to prepare order pursuant to 437 c(g). (JJM/MD)
